records.description: Invalid JSON in package.json — fix syntax errors (trailing commas, missing quotes); rewrite cwd to valid project root

shortest_verification.command: mkdir -p /tmp/_polaris_repro_json && echo '{"name":"x",}' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_json/package.json && cd /tmp/_polaris_repro_json && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8'))" 2>&1; rm -rf /tmp/_polaris_repro_json || true
